NGIS PHASE 3 — SPRINT REVIEW MEETING MINUTES
Meeting Date: March 3, 2026
Time: 13:00–14:30 EST
Location: WebEx / Room 4C-12, Place du Portage III, Gatineau

Attendees:
- Alice Tran (Project Manager) — Chair
- Bob Morrison (Technical Lead)
- Carol Nguyen (Infrastructure Architect)
- Dave Chen (Security Specialist)
- Marie Lefebvre (Change Management)
- Farida Osei (QA Lead)

Regrets: Director Okafor (represented by Alice Tran)

---

1. SPRINT 6 REVIEW (Feb 17 – Mar 3, 2026)

Completed Items:
- AD

risks.description: Vendor delivery delayed by 2 weeks, threatening March 18 migration window for Site A cutover

evidence_refs.excerpt: TechSupplier has confirmed a 2-week delay on Cisco Catalyst 9500 switches. Revised delivery is March 20. This threatens the March 18 migration window.

risks.description: No backup technical lead identified — Bob Morrison single point of failure for AD migration

evidence_refs.excerpt: Bob Morrison has indicated he is exploring external opportunities and may be leaving SSC within 60 days. Knowledge transfer plan must be initiated immediately given his role as the sole AD migration e

risks.description: Compliance finding raised by TBS Audit — ITSG-33 IA-5 PAW documentation 'inadvertently omitted' from SA&A package

evidence_refs.excerpt: TBS Audit identified an ITSG-33 IA-5 finding. Dave Chen confirmed the PAW documentation was inadvertently omitted from the SA&A package.

risks.description: Migration script depends on deprecated API endpoint scheduled for decommission on April 1, risking migration failure

evidence_refs.excerpt: The current migration script relies on the deprecated "legacy-sync" API endpoint scheduled for decommission on April 1.

risks.description: End-user communication plan only '60% complete', risking stakeholder readiness for upcoming migration
